Class ElasticsearchHost

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.ElasticsearchHost
public class ElasticsearchHost extends Object
Value Object containing information about Elasticsearch cluster nodes.
Since:
3.2
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • online

      public static ElasticsearchHost online(InetSocketAddress host)
      Parameters:
      host - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of ElasticsearchHost.

    • offline

      public static ElasticsearchHost offline(InetSocketAddress host)
      Parameters:
      host - must not be null.
      Returns:
      new instance of ElasticsearchHost.

    • parse

      public static InetSocketAddress parse(String hostAndPort)
      Parse a hostAndPort string into a InetSocketAddress.
      Parameters:
      hostAndPort - the string containing host and port or IP address and port in the format host:port.
      Returns:
      the parsed InetSocketAddress.

    • isOnline

      public boolean isOnline()
      Returns:
      true if the last known ElasticsearchHost.State was ElasticsearchHost.State.ONLINE

    • getEndpoint

      public InetSocketAddress getEndpoint()
      Returns:
      never null.

    • getState

      public ElasticsearchHost.State getState()
      Returns:
      the last known ElasticsearchHost.State.

    • getTimestamp

      public Instant getTimestamp()
      Returns:
      the Instant the information was captured.
